intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“新工作 -> 小偷冲出 -> 包和车的线索 -> 惊吓掉包 -> 报警和逮捕”的动作链读顺。注意 when、as、while 后面要小停顿。

sentences.text: Roy Trenton used to drive a taxi.
sentences.focus_zh: used to drive 表示过去常开；Roy Trenton 是人名，读成一个完整名字。

sentences.text: A short while ago, however, he became a bus driver and he has not regretted it.
sentences.focus_zh: A short while ago 后面稍停；has not regretted it 要读出“不后悔这个改变”。

sentences.text: When he was driving along Catford Street recently, he saw two thieves rush out of a shop and run towards a waiting car.
sentences.focus_zh: When 从句后要小停顿；rush out 和 run towards 是连续动作，不要读散。

sentences.text: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus straight at the thieves.
sentences.focus_zh: acted quickly 是快速反应；straight at 表示直接朝向，读时连起来。

sentences.text: The one with the money got such a fright that he dropped the bag.
sentences.focus_zh: such a fright that 是强烈惊吓造成结果；that he dropped the bag 要接住结果感。

sentences.text: As the thieves were trying to get away in their car, Roy drove his bus into the back of it.
sentences.focus_zh: As 引出正在逃跑的动作；get away 和 into the back of it 是本句的动作重点。

sentences.text: While the battered car was moving away, Roy stopped his bus and telephoned the police.
sentences.focus_zh: While 后面是车正在离开；battered car 和 telephoned the police 要读清楚。

sentences.text: Shortly afterwards, the police stopped the car and both men were arrested.
sentences.focus_zh: Shortly afterwards 是“不久之后”；were arrested 是被动结尾，读出结果。
